    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`CLI Banner
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`CLI startup banner controls for title/version line and tagline style behavior. Keep banner enabled for fast version/context checks, then tune tagline mode to your preferred noise level.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`CLI Banner Tagline Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls tagline style in the CLI startup banner: "random" (default) picks from the rotating tagline pool, "default" always shows the neutral default tagline, and "off" hides tagline text while keeping the banner version line.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`random
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`default
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`off
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cache-trace logging settings for observing cache decisions and payload context in embedded runs. Enable this temporarily for debugging and disable afterward to reduce sensitive log footprint.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Log cache trace snapshots for embedded agent runs (default: false).
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`JSONL output path for cache trace logs (default: $OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/logs/cache-trace.jsonl).`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Master toggle for diagnostics instrumentation output in logs and telemetry wiring paths. Keep enabled for normal observability, and disable only in tightly constrained environments.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry export settings for traces, metrics, and logs emitted by gateway components. Use this when integrating with centralized observability backends and distributed tracing pipelines.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables OpenTelemetry export pipeline for traces, metrics, and logs based on configured endpoint/protocol settings. Keep disabled unless your collector endpoint and auth are fully configured.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry Endpoint`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Collector endpoint URL used for OpenTelemetry export transport, including scheme and port. Use a reachable, trusted collector endpoint and monitor ingestion errors after rollout.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry Flush Interval (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Interval in milliseconds for periodic telemetry flush from buffers to the collector. Increase to reduce export chatter, or lower for faster visibility during active incident response.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry Headers
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Additional HTTP/gRPC metadata headers sent with OpenTelemetry export requests, often used for tenant auth or routing. Keep secrets in env-backed values and avoid unnecessary header sprawl.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-map">`
      `<div class="cfg-map__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-map__label">`Custom entries
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-map__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-map__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add Entry
        `</button>`
      `</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-map__empty">`No custom entries.`</div>`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry Logs Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enable log signal export through OpenTelemetry in addition to local logging sinks. Use this when centralized log correlation is required across services and agents.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry Metrics Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enable metrics signal export to the configured OpenTelemetry collector endpoint. Keep enabled for runtime health dashboards, and disable only if metric volume must be minimized.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry Protocol`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`OTel transport protocol for telemetry export: "http/protobuf" or "grpc" depending on collector support. Use the protocol your observability backend expects to avoid dropped telemetry payloads.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`http/protobuf
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`grpc
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry Trace Sample Rate`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Trace sampling rate (0-1) controlling how much trace traffic is exported to observability backends. Lower rates reduce overhead/cost, while higher rates improve debugging fidelity.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry Service Name`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Service name reported in telemetry resource attributes to identify this gateway instance in observability backends. Use stable names so dashboards and alerts remain consistent over deployments.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`OpenTelemetry Traces Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enable trace signal export to the configured OpenTelemetry collector endpoint. Keep enabled when latency/debug tracing is needed, and disable if you only want metrics/logs.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Stuck Session Warning Threshold (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Age threshold in milliseconds for emitting stuck-session warnings while a session remains in processing state. Increase for long multi-tool turns to reduce false positives; decrease for faster hang detection.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`

      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`
              `</section>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-gateway">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle>`
      `<line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"></line>`
      `<path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"></path>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway server settings (port, auth, binding)`</p>`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Allow x-real-ip Fallback
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables x-real-ip fallback when x-forwarded-for is missing in proxy scenarios. Keep disabled unless your ingress stack requires this compatibility behavior.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`reliability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Auth
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Authentication policy for gateway HTTP/WebSocket access including mode, credentials, trusted-proxy behavior, and rate limiting. Keep auth enabled for every non-loopback deployment.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Auth Allow Tailscale Identity
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allows trusted Tailscale identity paths to satisfy gateway auth checks when configured. Use this only when your tailnet identity posture is strong and operator workflows depend on it.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Auth Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway auth mode: "none", "token", "password", or "trusted-proxy" depending on your edge architecture. Use token/password for direct exposure, and trusted-proxy only behind hardened identity-aware proxies.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`none
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn active">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`token
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`password
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`trusted-proxy
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Password`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Required for Tailscale funnel.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="password" placeholder="••••">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Auth Rate Limit
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Login/auth attempt throttling controls to reduce credential brute-force risk at the gateway boundary. Keep enabled in exposed environments and tune thresholds to your traffic baseline.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Exempt Loopback
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
        `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Lockout Ms`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Max Attempts`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Window Ms`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

      `</summary>`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Bind Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Network bind profile: "auto", "lan", "loopback", "custom", or "tailnet" to control interface exposure. Keep "loopback" or "auto" for safest local operation unless external clients must connect.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`auto
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`lan
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn active">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`loopback
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`custom
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`tailnet
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Channel Health Check Interval (min)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Interval in minutes for automatic channel health probing and status updates. Use lower intervals for faster detection, or higher intervals to reduce periodic probe noise.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`reliability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Control UI
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`

      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Control UI hosting settings including enablement, pathing, and browser-origin/auth hardening behavior. Keep UI exposure minimal and pair with strong auth controls before internet-facing deployments.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`

    `</div>`

      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allowed browser origins for Control UI/WebChat websocket connections (full origins only, e.g. https://control.example.com). Required for non-loopback Control UI deployments unless dangerous Host-header fallback is explicitly enabled.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Insecure Control UI Auth Toggle
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Loosens strict browser auth checks for Control UI when you must run a non-standard setup. Keep this off unless you trust your network and proxy path, because impersonation risk is higher.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`

    `</div>`

        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Control UI Base Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional URL prefix where the Control UI is served (e.g. /openclaw).`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Dangerously Allow Host-Header Origin Fallback
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`DANGEROUS toggle that enables Host-header based origin fallback for Control UI/WebChat websocket checks. This mode is supported when your deployment intentionally relies on Host-header origin policy; explicit gateway.controlUi.allowedOrigins remains the recommended hardened default.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Dangerously Disable Control UI Device Auth
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Disables Control UI device identity checks and relies on token/password only. Use only for short-lived debugging on trusted networks, then turn it off immediately.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`

          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`

        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Control UI Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables serving the gateway Control UI from the gateway HTTP process when true. Keep enabled for local administration, and disable when an external control surface replaces it.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`

          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`

    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway HTTP API configuration grouping endpoint toggles and transport-facing API exposure controls. Keep only required endpoints enabled to reduce attack surface.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`HTTP endpoint feature toggles under the gateway API surface for compatibility routes and optional integrations. Enable endpoints intentionally and monitor access patterns after rollout.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`

    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway HTTP Security Headers
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional HTTP response security headers applied by the gateway process itself. Prefer setting these at your reverse proxy when TLS terminates there.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Strict Transport Security Header`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Value for the Strict-Transport-Security response header. Set only on HTTPS origins that you fully control; use false to explicitly disable.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway operation mode: "local" runs channels and agent runtime on this host, while "remote" connects through remote transport. Keep "local" unless you intentionally run a split remote gateway topology.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`local
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`remote
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`

      `</summary>`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s

    `</svg>`

        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Extra node.invoke commands to allow beyond the gateway defaults (array of command strings). Enabling dangerous commands here is a security-sensitive override and is flagged by `openclaw security audit`.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Node browser routing ("auto" = pick single connected browser node, "manual" = require node param, "off" = disable).`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Port`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`TCP port used by the gateway listener for API, control UI, and channel-facing ingress paths. Use a dedicated port and avoid collisions with reverse proxies or local developer services.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Config Reload
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`reliability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Live config-reload policy for how edits are applied and when full restarts are triggered. Keep hybrid behavior for safest operational updates unless debugging reload internals.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Config Reload Debounce (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Debounce window (ms) before applying config changes.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`reliability`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Config Reload Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls how config edits are applied: "off" ignores live edits, "restart" always restarts, "hot" applies in-process, and "hybrid" tries hot then restarts if required. Keep "hybrid" for safest routine updates.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`reliability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`off
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`restart
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`hot
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`hybrid
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Gateway
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote gateway connection settings for direct or SSH transport when this instance proxies to another runtime host. Use remote mode only when split-host operation is intentionally configured.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Gateway Password`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Password credential used for remote gateway authentication when password mode is enabled. Keep this secret managed externally and avoid plaintext values in committed config.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="password" placeholder="••••">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Gateway SSH Identity`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional SSH identity file path (passed to ssh -i).`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Gateway SSH Target`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote gateway over SSH (tunnels the gateway port to localhost). Format: user@host or user@host:port.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="user@host">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Gateway TLS Fingerprint`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Expected sha256 TLS fingerprint for the remote gateway (pin to avoid MITM).`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="sha256:ab12cd34…">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Gateway Token`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Bearer token used to authenticate this client to a remote gateway in token-auth deployments. Store via secret/env substitution and rotate alongside remote gateway auth changes.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="password" placeholder="••••">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Gateway Transport`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote connection transport: "direct" uses configured URL connectivity, while "ssh" tunnels through SSH. Use SSH when you need encrypted tunnel semantics without exposing remote ports.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`ssh
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`direct
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Gateway URL`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Gateway WebSocket URL (ws:// or wss://).`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="ws://host:18789">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Tailscale
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Tailscale integration settings for Serve/Funnel exposure and lifecycle handling on gateway start/exit. Keep off unless your deployment intentionally relies on Tailscale ingress.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Tailscale Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Tailscale publish mode: "off", "serve", or "funnel" for private or public exposure paths. Use "serve" for tailnet-only access and "funnel" only when public internet reachability is required.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn active">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`off
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`serve
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`funnel
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Tailscale Reset on Exit
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Resets Tailscale Serve/Funnel state on gateway exit to avoid stale published routes after shutdown. Keep enabled unless another controller manages publish lifecycle outside the gateway.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway TLS
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`TLS certificate and key settings for terminating HTTPS directly in the gateway process. Use explicit certificates in production and avoid plaintext exposure on untrusted networks.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway TLS Auto-Generate Cert
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Auto-generates a local TLS certificate/key pair when explicit files are not configured. Use only for local/dev setups and replace with real certificates for production traffic.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway TLS CA Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional CA bundle path for client verification or custom trust-chain requirements at the gateway edge. Use this when private PKI or custom certificate chains are part of deployment.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway TLS Certificate Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Filesystem path to the TLS certificate file used by the gateway when TLS is enabled. Use managed certificate paths and keep renewal automation aligned with this location.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway TLS Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables TLS termination at the gateway listener so clients connect over HTTPS/WSS directly. Keep enabled for direct internet exposure or any untrusted network boundary.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway TLS Key Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Filesystem path to the TLS private key file used by the gateway when TLS is enabled. Keep this key file permission-restricted and rotate per your security policy.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Tool Exposure Policy
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway-level tool exposure allow/deny policy that can restrict runtime tool availability independent of agent/tool profiles. Use this for coarse emergency controls and production hardening.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Tool Allowlist
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Explicit gateway-level tool allowlist when you want a narrow set of tools available at runtime. Use this for locked-down environments where tool scope must be tightly controlled.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Tool Denylist
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Explicit gateway-level tool denylist to block risky tools even if lower-level policies allow them. Use deny rules for emergency response and defense-in-depth hardening.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gateway Trusted Proxy CIDRs
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`1 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`CIDR/IP allowlist of upstream proxies permitted to provide forwarded client identity headers. Keep this list narrow so untrusted hops cannot impersonate users.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
        `<div class="cfg-array__items">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
            `<div class="cfg-array__item">`

                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"></polyline>`
      `<path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"></path>`
    `</svg>`

    `</button>`
              `</div>`
              `<div class="cfg-array__item-content">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`CIDR/IP allowlist of upstream proxies permitted to provide forwarded client identity headers. Keep this list narrow so untrusted hops cannot impersonate users.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`

            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-nodeHost">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"></path>`
      `<polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`NodeHost`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Node Browser Proxy
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Groups browser-proxy settings for exposing local browser control through node routing. Enable only when remote node workflows need your local browser profiles.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Node Browser Proxy Allowed Profiles
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional allowlist of browser profile names exposed through node proxy routing. Leave empty to expose all configured profiles, or use a tight list to enforce least-privilege profile access.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Node Browser Proxy Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Expose the local browser control server through node proxy routing so remote clients can use this host's browser capabilities. Keep disabled unless remote automation explicitly depends on it.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-agents">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction tuning for when context nears token limits, including history share, reserve headroom, and pre-compaction memory flush behavior. Use this when long-running sessions need stable continuity under tight context windows.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Identifier Instructions`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Custom identifier-preservation instruction text used when identifierPolicy="custom". Keep this explicit and safety-focused so compaction summaries do not rewrite opaque IDs, URLs, hosts, or ports.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Identifier Policy`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Identifier-preservation policy for compaction summaries: "strict" prepends built-in opaque-identifier retention guidance (default), "off" disables this prefix, and "custom" uses identifierInstructions. Keep "strict" unless you have a specific compatibility need.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`strict
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`off
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`custom
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Keep Recent Tokens`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Minimum token budget preserved from the most recent conversation window during compaction. Use higher values to protect immediate context continuity and lower values to keep more long-tail history.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Max History Share`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum fraction of total context budget allowed for retained history after compaction (range 0.1-0.9). Use lower shares for more generation headroom or higher shares for deeper historical continuity.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Memory Flush
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Pre-compaction memory flush settings that run an agentic memory write before heavy compaction. Keep enabled for long sessions so salient context is persisted before aggressive trimming.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Memory Flush Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables pre-compaction memory flush before the runtime performs stronger history reduction near token limits. Keep enabled unless you intentionally disable memory side effects in constrained environments.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Memory Flush Transcript Size Threshold`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Forces pre-compaction memory flush when transcript file size reaches this threshold (bytes or strings like "2mb"). Use this to prevent long-session hangs even when token counters are stale; set to 0 to disable.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Memory Flush Prompt`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`User-prompt template used for the pre-compaction memory flush turn when generating memory candidates. Use this only when you need custom extraction instructions beyond the default memory flush behavior.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Memory Flush Soft Threshold`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Threshold distance to compaction (in tokens) that triggers pre-compaction memory flush execution. Use earlier thresholds for safer persistence, or tighter thresholds for lower flush frequency.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Memory Flush System Prompt`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`System-prompt override for the pre-compaction memory flush turn to control extraction style and safety constraints. Use carefully so custom instructions do not reduce memory quality or leak sensitive context.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction strategy mode: "default" uses baseline behavior, while "safeguard" applies stricter guardrails to preserve recent context. Keep "default" unless you observe aggressive history loss near limit boundaries.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`
