    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Quality Guard
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional quality-audit retry settings for safeguard compaction summaries. Leave this disabled unless you explicitly want summary audits and one-shot regeneration on failed checks.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Quality Guard Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables summary quality audits and regeneration retries for safeguard compaction. Default: false, so safeguard mode alone does not turn on retry behavior.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Compaction Quality Guard Max Retries`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum number of regeneration retries after a failed safeguard summary quality audit. Use small values to bound extra latency and token cost.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Token headroom reserved for reply generation and tool output after compaction runs. Use higher reserves for verbose/tool-heavy sessions, and lower reserves when maximizing retained history matters more.`</div>`

    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`

    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Embedded Pi runner hardening controls for how workspace-local Pi settings are trusted and applied in OpenClaw sessions.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Embedded Pi Project Settings Policy`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`How embedded Pi handles workspace-local `.pi/config/settings.json`: "sanitize" (default) strips shellPath/shellCommandPrefix, "ignore" disables project settings entirely, and "trusted" applies project settings as-is.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`trusted
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`sanitize
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`ignore
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Vector search over MEMORY.md and memory/*.md (per-agent overrides supported).`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cache
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Embedding Cache
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Caches computed chunk embeddings in SQLite so reindexing and incremental updates run faster (default: true). Keep this enabled unless investigating cache correctness or minimizing disk usage.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Embedding Cache Max Entries`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets a best-effort upper bound on cached embeddings kept in SQLite for memory search. Use this when controlling disk growth matters more than peak reindex speed.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Chunking
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Chunk Overlap Tokens`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Token overlap between adjacent memory chunks to preserve context continuity near split boundaries. Use modest overlap to reduce boundary misses without inflating index size too aggressively.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Chunk Tokens`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Chunk size in tokens used when splitting memory sources before embedding/indexing. Increase for broader context per chunk, or lower to improve precision on pinpoint lookups.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Master toggle for memory search indexing and retrieval behavior on this agent profile. Keep enabled for semantic recall, and disable when you want fully stateless responses.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Indexes session transcripts into memory search so responses can reference prior chat turns. Keep this off unless transcript recall is needed, because indexing cost and storage usage both increase.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Backup provider used when primary embeddings fail: "openai", "gemini", "voyage", "mistral", "ollama", "local", or "none". Set a real fallback for production reliability; use "none" only if you prefer explicit failures.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Specifies the local embedding model source for local memory search, such as a GGUF file path or `hf:` URI. Use this only when provider is `local`, and verify model compatibility before large index rebuilds.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Model`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Embedding model override used by the selected memory provider when a non-default model is required. Set this only when you need explicit recall quality/cost tuning beyond provider defaults.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!---->`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Provider`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Selects the embedding backend used to build/query memory vectors: "openai", "gemini", "voyage", "mistral", "ollama", or "local". Keep your most reliable provider here and configure fallback for resilience.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<select class="cfg-select">`
        `<option value="__unset__">`Select...`</option>`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`

        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="1"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`local`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="2"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`gemini`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="3"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`voyage`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="4"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`mistral`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="5"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`ollama`</option>`
        `<!---->`
      `</select>`
    `</div>`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`

    `<details class="cfg-object">`

        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Hybrid
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Hybrid Candidate Multiplier`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Expands the candidate pool before reranking (default: 4). Raise this for better recall on noisy corpora, but expect more compute and slightly slower searches.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Hybrid
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Combines BM25 keyword matching with vector similarity for better recall on mixed exact + semantic queries. Keep enabled unless you are isolating ranking behavior for troubleshooting.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Mmr
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search MMR Re-ranking
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Adds MMR reranking to diversify results and reduce near-duplicate snippets in a single answer window. Enable when recall looks repetitive; keep off for strict score ordering.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search MMR Lambda`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets MMR relevance-vs-diversity balance (0 = most diverse, 1 = most relevant, default: 0.7). Lower values reduce repetition; higher values keep tightly relevant but may duplicate.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Temporal Decay
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Temporal Decay
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Applies recency decay so newer memory can outrank older memory when scores are close. Enable when timeliness matters; keep off for timeless reference knowledge.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Temporal Decay Half-life (Days)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls how fast older memory loses rank when temporal decay is enabled (half-life in days, default: 30). Lower values prioritize recent context more aggressively.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Text Weight`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls how strongly BM25 keyword relevance influences hybrid ranking (0-1). Increase for exact-term matching; decrease when semantic matches should rank higher.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Vector Weight`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls how strongly semantic similarity influences hybrid ranking (0-1). Increase when paraphrase matching matters more than exact terms; decrease for stricter keyword emphasis.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Max Results`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum number of memory hits returned from search before downstream reranking and prompt injection. Raise for broader recall, or lower for tighter prompts and faster responses.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Min Score`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Minimum relevance score threshold for including memory results in final recall output. Increase to reduce weak/noisy matches, or lower when you need more permissive retrieval.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Embedding API Key`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Supplies a dedicated API key for remote embedding calls used by memory indexing and query-time embeddings. Use this when memory embeddings should use different credentials than global defaults or environment variables.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="password" placeholder="••••">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Embedding Base URL`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Overrides the embedding API endpoint, such as an OpenAI-compatible proxy or custom Gemini base URL. Use this only when routing through your own gateway or vendor endpoint; keep provider defaults otherwise.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Batch
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Batch Concurrency`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Limits how many embedding batch jobs run at the same time during indexing (default: 2). Increase carefully for faster bulk indexing, but watch provider rate limits and queue errors.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Batch Embedding Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables provider batch APIs for embedding jobs when supported (OpenAI/Gemini), improving throughput on larger index runs. Keep this enabled unless debugging provider batch failures or running very small workloads.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Batch Poll Interval (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls how often the system polls provider APIs for batch job status in milliseconds (default: 2000). Use longer intervals to reduce API chatter, or shorter intervals for faster completion detection.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Batch Timeout (min)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets the maximum wait time for a full embedding batch operation in minutes (default: 60). Increase for very large corpora or slower providers, and lower it to fail fast in automation-heavy flows.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Batch Wait for Completion
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Waits for batch embedding jobs to fully finish before the indexing operation completes. Keep this enabled for deterministic indexing state; disable only if you accept delayed consistency.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote Embedding Headers
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Adds custom HTTP headers to remote embedding requests, merged with provider defaults. Use this for proxy auth and tenant routing headers, and keep values minimal to avoid leaking sensitive metadata.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-map">`
      `<div class="cfg-map__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-map__label">`Custom entries
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-map__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-map__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add Entry
        `</button>`
      `</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-map__empty">`No custom entries.`</div>`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Sources
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Chooses which sources are indexed: "memory" reads MEMORY.md + memory files, and "sessions" includes transcript history. Keep ["memory"] unless you need recall from prior chat transcripts.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Index Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets where the SQLite memory index is stored on disk for each agent. Keep the default `~/.openclaw/memory/{agentId}.sqlite` unless you need custom storage placement or backup policy alignment.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Vector
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Vector Index
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables the sqlite-vec extension used for vector similarity queries in memory search (default: true). Keep this enabled for normal semantic recall; disable only for debugging or fallback-only operation.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Search Vector Extension Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Overrides the auto-discovered sqlite-vec extension library path (`.dylib`, `.so`, or `.dll`). Use this when your runtime cannot find sqlite-vec automatically or you pin a known-good build.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sync
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Interval Minutes`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Index on Search (Lazy)
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Uses lazy sync by scheduling reindex on search after content changes are detected. Keep enabled for lower idle overhead, or disable if you require pre-synced indexes before any query.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Index on Session Start
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Triggers a memory index sync when a session starts so early turns see fresh memory content. Keep enabled when startup freshness matters more than initial turn latency.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sessions
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Delta Bytes`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Requires at least this many newly appended bytes before session transcript changes trigger reindex (default: 100000). Increase to reduce frequent small reindexes, or lower for faster transcript freshness.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Delta Messages`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Requires at least this many appended transcript messages before reindex is triggered (default: 50). Lower this for near-real-time transcript recall, or raise it to reduce indexing churn.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Watch Memory Files
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Watches memory files and schedules index updates from file-change events (chokidar). Enable for near-real-time freshness; disable on very large workspaces if watch churn is too noisy.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Watch Debounce (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Debounce window in milliseconds for coalescing rapid file-watch events before reindex runs. Increase to reduce churn on frequently-written files, or lower for faster freshness.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!----><div class="cfg-field cfg-field--error">

    `<div class="cfg-field__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Model`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-field__error">`Unsupported schema node. Use Raw mode.`</div>`
    `</div><!---->``<!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Models
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`ACP delivery style: live streams projected output incrementally, final_only buffers all projected ACP output until terminal turn events.`</div>`

                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"></path>`
      `<polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Approvals`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Exec Approval Forwarding
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Groups exec-approval forwarding behavior including enablement, routing mode, filters, and explicit targets. Configure here when approval prompts must reach operational channels instead of only the origin thread.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Approval Agent Filter
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional allowlist of agent IDs eligible for forwarded approvals, for example `["primary", "ops-agent"]`. Use this to limit forwarding blast radius and avoid notifying channels for unrelated agents.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Forward Exec Approvals
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables forwarding of exec approval requests to configured delivery destinations (default: false). Keep disabled in low-risk setups and enable only when human approval responders need channel-visible prompts.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Approval Forwarding Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls where approval prompts are sent: "session" uses origin chat, "targets" uses configured targets, and "both" sends to both paths. Use "session" as baseline and expand only when operational workflow requires redundancy.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`session
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`targets
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`both
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Approval Session Filter
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional session-key filters matched as substring or regex-style patterns, for example `["discord:", "^agent:ops:"]`. Use narrow patterns so only intended approval contexts are forwarded to shared destinations.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Auth Cooldowns
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!---->`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cooldown/backoff controls for temporary profile suppression after billing-related failures and retry windows. Use these to prevent rapid re-selection of profiles that are still blocked.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Base backoff (hours) when a profile fails due to billing/insufficient credits (default: 5).`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`reliability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Named auth profiles (provider + mode + optional email).`</div>`

        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Broadcast Strategy`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Delivery order for broadcast fan-out: "parallel" sends to all targets concurrently, while "sequential" sends one-by-one. Use "parallel" for speed and "sequential" for stricter ordering/backpressure control.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`

              `</button>`
            `<!---->`

        `</div>`
      `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-canvasHost">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>`
      `<circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5"></circle>`
      `<polyline points="21 15 16 10 5 21"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Canvas Host`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Canvas rendering and display`</p>`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Canvas Host Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables the canvas host server process and routes for serving canvas files. Keep disabled when canvas workflows are inactive to reduce exposed local services.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Canvas Host Live Reload
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables automatic live-reload behavior for canvas assets during development workflows. Keep disabled in production-like environments where deterministic output is preferred.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`reliability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Canvas Host Port`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`TCP port used by the canvas host HTTP server when canvas hosting is enabled. Choose a non-conflicting port and align firewall/proxy policy accordingly.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Canvas Host Root Directory`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Filesystem root directory served by canvas host for canvas content and static assets. Use a dedicated directory and avoid broad repo roots for least-privilege file exposure.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`
              `</section>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-env">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"></circle>`
      `<path d="M19.4 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33 1.82l.06.06a2 2 0 0 1 0 2.83 2 2 0 0 1-2.83 0l-.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82-.33 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1 1.51V21a2 2 0 0 1-2 2 2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 19.4a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82.33l-.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83 0 2 2 0 0 1 0-2.83l.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33-1.82 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51-1H3a2 2 0 0 1-2-2 2 2 0 0 1 2-2h.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.6 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33-1.82l-.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 0-2.83 2 2 0 0 1 2.83 0l.06.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82.33H9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1-1.51V3a2 2 0 0 1 2-2 2 2 0 0 1 2 2v.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1 1.51 1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82-.33l.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83 0 2 2 0 0 1 0 2.83l-.06.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33 1.82V9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.51 1H21a2 2 0 0 1 2 2 2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51 1z"></path>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Environment Variables`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Environment variables passed to the gateway process`</p>`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Shell Environment Import
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Shell environment import controls for loading variables from your login shell during startup. Keep this enabled when you depend on profile-defined secrets or PATH customizations.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Shell Environment Import Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables loading environment variables from the user shell profile during startup initialization. Keep enabled for developer machines, or disable in locked-down service environments with explicit env management.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Shell Environment Import Timeout (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum time in milliseconds allowed for shell environment resolution before fallback behavior applies. Use tighter timeouts for faster startup, or increase when shell initialization is heavy.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Environment Variable Overrides
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Explicit key/value environment variable overrides merged into runtime process environment for OpenClaw. Use this for deterministic env configuration instead of relying only on shell profile side effects.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`

    `</svg>`

          Add Entry

      `</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`

    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`

      `<div class="cfg-fields">`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Preserve Media Filenames
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`When enabled, uploaded media keeps its original filename instead of a generated temp-safe name. Turn this on when downstream automations depend on stable names, and leave off to reduce accidental filename leakage.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`
