            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-memory">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"></path>`
      `<polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Backend`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Selects the global memory engine: "builtin" uses OpenClaw memory internals, while "qmd" uses the QMD sidecar pipeline. Keep "builtin" unless you intentionally operate QMD.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`builtin
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`qmd
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Memory Citations Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls citation visibility in replies: "auto" shows citations when useful, "on" always shows them, and "off" hides them. Keep "auto" for a balanced signal-to-noise default.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`auto
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`on
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`off
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Qmd
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Binary`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets the executable path for the `qmd` binary used by the QMD backend (default: resolved from PATH). Use an explicit absolute path when multiple qmd installs exist or PATH differs across environments.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Include Default Memory
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Automatically indexes default memory files (MEMORY.md and memory/**/*.md) into QMD collections. Keep enabled unless you want indexing controlled only through explicit custom paths.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Limits
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Max Injected Chars`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Caps how much QMD text can be injected into one turn across all hits. Use lower values to control prompt bloat and latency; raise only when context is consistently truncated.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Max Results`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Limits how many QMD hits are returned into the agent loop for each recall request (default: 6). Increase for broader recall context, or lower to keep prompts tighter and faster.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Max Snippet Chars`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Caps per-result snippet length extracted from QMD hits in characters (default: 700). Lower this when prompts bloat quickly, and raise only if answers consistently miss key details.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Search Timeout (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets per-query QMD search timeout in milliseconds (default: 4000). Increase for larger indexes or slower environments, and lower to keep request latency bounded.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD MCPorter
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Routes QMD work through mcporter (MCP runtime) instead of spawning `qmd` for each call. Use this when cold starts are expensive on large models; keep direct process mode for simpler local setups.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD MCPorter Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Routes QMD through an mcporter daemon instead of spawning qmd per request, reducing cold-start overhead for larger models. Keep disabled unless mcporter is installed and configured.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD MCPorter Server Name`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Names the mcporter server target used for QMD calls (default: qmd). Change only when your mcporter setup uses a custom server name for qmd mcp keep-alive.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD MCPorter Start Daemon
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Automatically starts the mcporter daemon when mcporter-backed QMD mode is enabled (default: true). Keep enabled unless process lifecycle is managed externally by your service supervisor.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Extra Paths
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Adds custom directories or files to include in QMD indexing, each with an optional name and glob pattern. Use this for project-specific knowledge locations that are outside default memory paths.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Surface Scope
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Defines which sessions/channels are eligible for QMD recall using session.sendPolicy-style rules. Keep default direct-only scope unless you intentionally want cross-chat memory sharing.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Default`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
          `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`allow
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`deny
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Rules
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
        `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Search Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Selects the QMD retrieval path: "query" uses standard query flow, "search" uses search-oriented retrieval, and "vsearch" emphasizes vector retrieval. Keep default unless tuning relevance quality.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`query
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`search
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`vsearch
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sessions
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Session Indexing
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Indexes session transcripts into QMD so recall can include prior conversation content (experimental, default: false). Enable only when transcript memory is required and you accept larger index churn.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Session Export Directory`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Overrides where sanitized session exports are written before QMD indexing. Use this when default state storage is constrained or when exports must land on a managed volume.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Session Retention (days)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Defines how long exported session files are kept before automatic pruning, in days (default: unlimited). Set a finite value for storage hygiene or compliance retention policies.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Update
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

        `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Command Timeout (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets timeout for QMD maintenance commands such as collection list/add in milliseconds (default: 30000). Increase when running on slower disks or remote filesystems that delay command completion.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Update Debounce (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets the minimum delay between consecutive QMD refresh attempts in milliseconds (default: 15000). Increase this if frequent file changes cause update thrash or unnecessary background load.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Embed Interval`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets how often QMD recomputes embeddings (duration string, default: 60m; set 0 to disable periodic embeds). Lower intervals improve freshness but increase embedding workload and cost.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Embed Timeout (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets maximum runtime for each `qmd embed` cycle in milliseconds (default: 120000). Increase for heavier embedding workloads or slower hardware, and lower to fail fast under tight SLAs.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Update Interval`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets how often QMD refreshes indexes from source content (duration string, default: 5m). Shorter intervals improve freshness but increase background CPU and I/O.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Update on Startup
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Runs an initial QMD update once during gateway startup (default: true). Keep enabled so recall starts from a fresh baseline; disable only when startup speed is more important than immediate freshness.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Update Timeout (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets maximum runtime for each `qmd update` cycle in milliseconds (default: 120000). Raise this for larger collections; lower it when you want quicker failure detection in automation.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`QMD Wait for Boot Sync
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Blocks startup completion until the initial boot-time QMD sync finishes (default: false). Enable when you need fully up-to-date recall before serving traffic, and keep off for faster boot.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`

    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<path d="M14.7 6.3a1 1 0 0 0 0 1.4l1.6 1.6a1 1 0 0 0 1.4 0l3.77-3.77a6 6 0 0 1-7.94 7.94l-6.91 6.91a2.12 2.12 0 0 1-3-3l6.91-6.91a6 6 0 0 1 7.94-7.94l-3.76 3.76z"></path>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`

                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Tool configurations (browser, search, etc.)`</p>`
                  `</div>`

                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Agent-to-Agent Tool Access
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`tools`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Policy for allowing agent-to-agent tool calls and constraining which target agents can be reached. Keep disabled or tightly scoped unless cross-agent orchestration is intentionally enabled.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Agent-to-Agent Target Allowlist
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`tools`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allowlist of target agent IDs permitted for agent_to_agent calls when orchestration is enabled. Use explicit allowlists to avoid uncontrolled cross-agent call graphs.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enable Agent-to-Agent Tool
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables the agent_to_agent tool surface so one agent can invoke another agent at runtime. Keep off in simple deployments and enable only when orchestration value outweighs complexity.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`tools`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Tool Allowlist
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`tools`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Absolute tool allowlist that replaces profile-derived defaults for strict environments. Use this only when you intentionally run a tightly curated subset of tool capabilities.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Tool Allowlist Additions
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`tools`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Extra tool allowlist entries merged on top of the selected tool profile and default policy. Keep this list small and explicit so audits can quickly identify intentional policy exceptions.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Tool Policy by Provider
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`tools`<!---->`

    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Per-provider tool allow/deny overrides keyed by channel/provider ID to tailor capabilities by surface. Use this when one provider needs stricter controls than global tool policy.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`

          Add Entry

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`tools`<!---->`

      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add

      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Global tool denylist that blocks listed tools even when profile or provider rules would allow them. Use deny rules for emergency lockouts and long-term defense-in-depth.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Elevated tool access controls for privileged command surfaces that should only be reachable from trusted senders. Keep disabled unless operator workflows explicitly require elevated actions.`</div>`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`tools`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`

      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Tool policy wrapper for sandboxed agent executions so sandbox runs can have distinct capability boundaries. Use this to enforce stronger safety in sandbox contexts.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allow/deny tool policy applied when agents run in sandboxed execution environments. Keep policies minimal so sandbox tasks cannot escalate into unnecessary external actions.`</div>`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Tool policy wrapper for spawned subagents to restrict or expand tool availability compared to parent defaults. Use this to keep delegated agent capabilities scoped to task intent.`</div>`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web-tool policy grouping for search/fetch providers, limits, and fallback behavior tuning. Keep enabled settings aligned with API key availability and outbound networking policy.`</div>`

            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-web">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle>`
      `<line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"></line>`
      `<path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"></path>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web server and API settings`</p>`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web Channel Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables the web channel runtime and related websocket lifecycle behavior. Keep disabled when web chat is unused to reduce active connection management overhead.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web Channel Heartbeat Interval (sec)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Heartbeat interval in seconds for web channel connectivity and liveness maintenance. Use shorter intervals for faster detection, or longer intervals to reduce keepalive chatter.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web Channel Reconnect Policy
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Reconnect backoff policy for web channel reconnect attempts after transport failure. Keep bounded retries and jitter tuned to avoid thundering-herd reconnect behavior.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web Reconnect Backoff Factor`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Exponential backoff multiplier used between reconnect attempts in web channel retry loops. Keep factor above 1 and tune with jitter for stable large-fleet reconnect behavior.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web Reconnect Initial Delay (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Initial reconnect delay in milliseconds before the first retry after disconnection. Use modest delays to recover quickly without immediate retry storms.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web Reconnect Jitter`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Randomization factor (0-1) applied to reconnect delays to desynchronize clients after outage events. Keep non-zero jitter in multi-client deployments to reduce synchronized spikes.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web Reconnect Max Attempts`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum reconnect attempts before giving up for the current failure sequence (0 means no retries). Use finite caps for controlled failure handling in automation-sensitive environments.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Web Reconnect Max Delay (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum reconnect backoff cap in milliseconds to bound retry delay growth over repeated failures. Use a reasonable cap so recovery remains timely after prolonged outages.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`

              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-audio">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<path d="M9 18V5l12-2v13"></path>`
      `<circle cx="6" cy="18" r="3"></circle>`
      `<circle cx="18" cy="16" r="3"></circle>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Audio`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Audio input/output settings`</p>`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Audio Transcription
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`media`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Command-based transcription settings for converting audio files into text before agent handling. Keep a simple, deterministic command path here so failures are easy to diagnose in logs.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Audio Transcription Command
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`media`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Executable + args used to transcribe audio (first token must be a safe binary/path), for example `["whisper-cli", "--model", "small", "{input}"]`. Prefer a pinned command so runtime environments behave consistently.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Audio Transcription Timeout (sec)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum time allowed for the transcription command to finish before it is aborted. Increase this for longer recordings, and keep it tight in latency-sensitive deployments.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`media`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`

<!---->

    `</div>`
              `</section>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-models">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"></path>`
      `<polyline points="3.27 6.96 12 12.01 20.73 6.96"></polyline>`
      `<line x1="12" y1="22.08" x2="12" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Models`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`AI model configurations and providers`</p>`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Bedrock Model Discovery
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Automatic AWS Bedrock model discovery settings used to synthesize provider model entries from account visibility. Keep discovery scoped and refresh intervals conservative to reduce API churn.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Bedrock Default Context Window`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Fallback context-window value applied to discovered models when provider metadata lacks explicit limits. Use realistic defaults to avoid oversized prompts that exceed true provider constraints.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Bedrock Default Max Tokens`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Fallback max-token value applied to discovered models without explicit output token limits. Use conservative defaults to reduce truncation surprises and unexpected token spend.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Bedrock Discovery Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables periodic Bedrock model discovery and catalog refresh for Bedrock-backed providers. Keep disabled unless Bedrock is actively used and IAM permissions are correctly configured.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Bedrock Discovery Provider Filter
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional provider allowlist filter for Bedrock discovery so only selected providers are refreshed. Use this to limit discovery scope in multi-provider environments.`</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Bedrock Discovery Refresh Interval (s)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Refresh cadence for Bedrock discovery polling in seconds to detect newly available models over time. Use longer intervals in production to reduce API cost and control-plane noise.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!---->`

      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Bedrock Discovery Region`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`AWS region used for Bedrock discovery calls when discovery is enabled for your deployment. Use the region where your Bedrock models are provisioned to avoid empty discovery results.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!---->`

      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Model Catalog Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls provider catalog behavior: "merge" keeps built-ins and overlays your custom providers, while "replace" uses only your configured providers. In "merge", matching provider IDs preserve non-empty agent models.json apiKey/baseUrl values and fall back to config when agent values are empty or missing; matching model contextWindow/maxTokens use the higher value between explicit and implicit entries.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn active">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`merge
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`replace
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Provider map keyed by provider ID containing connection/auth settings and concrete model definitions. Use stable provider keys so references from agents and tooling remain portable across environments.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Provider API adapter selection controlling request/response compatibility handling for model calls. Use the adapter that matches your upstream provider protocol to avoid feature mismatch.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Provider credential used for API-key based authentication when the provider requires direct key auth. Use secret/env substitution and avoid storing real keys in committed config files.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Model Provider Auth Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Selects provider auth style: "api-key" for API key auth, "token" for bearer token auth, "oauth" for OAuth credentials, and "aws-sdk" for AWS credential resolution. Match this to your provider requirements.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`When true, credentials are sent via the HTTP Authorization header even if alternate auth is possible. Use this only when your provider or proxy explicitly requires Authorization forwarding.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`When to send ack reactions ("group-mentions", "group-all", "direct", "all", "off", "none"). "off"/"none" disables ack reactions entirely.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Group Chat Rules
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Group-message handling controls including mention triggers and history window sizing. Keep mention patterns narrow so group channels do not trigger on every message.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Group History Limit`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum number of prior group messages loaded as context per turn for group sessions. Use higher values for richer continuity, or lower values for faster and cheaper responses.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Group Mention Patterns
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Regex-like patterns used to detect explicit mentions/trigger phrases in group chats. Use precise patterns to reduce false positives in high-volume channels.`</div>`

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Inbound Debounce
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Direct inbound debounce settings used before queue/turn processing starts. Configure this for provider-specific rapid message bursts from the same sender.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Inbound Debounce by Channel (ms)
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Per-channel inbound debounce overrides keyed by provider id in milliseconds. Use this where some providers send message fragments more aggressively than others.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Inbound Message Debounce (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Debounce window (ms) for batching rapid inbound messages from the same sender (0 to disable).`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Inbound Message Prefix`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Prefix text prepended to inbound user messages before they are handed to the agent runtime. Use this sparingly for channel context markers and keep it stable across sessions.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Inbound Queue
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Inbound message queue strategy used to buffer bursts before processing turns. Tune this for busy channels where sequential processing or batching behavior matters.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Per-channel queue mode overrides keyed by provider id (for example telegram, discord, slack). Use this when one channel’s traffic pattern needs different queue behavior than global defaults.`</div>`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Global queue debounce window in milliseconds before processing buffered inbound messages. Use higher values to coalesce rapid bursts, or lower values for reduced response latency.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`

      `</div>`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Drop strategy when queue cap is exceeded: "old", "new", or "summarize". Use summarize when preserving intent matters, or old/new when deterministic dropping is preferred.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Queue behavior mode: "steer", "followup", "collect", "steer-backlog", "steer+backlog", "queue", or "interrupt". Keep conservative modes unless you intentionally need aggressive interruption/backlog semantics.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Defines elevated command allow rules by channel and sender for owner-level command surfaces. Use narrow provider-specific identities so privileged commands are not exposed to broad chat audiences.`</div>`
