    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Owner ID Display`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls how owner IDs are rendered in the system prompt. Allowed values: raw, hash. Default: raw.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn active">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`raw
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`hash
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Owner ID Hash Secret`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional secret used to HMAC hash owner IDs when ownerDisplay=hash. Prefer env substitution.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="password" placeholder="••••">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allow Restart
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allow /restart and gateway restart tool actions (default: true).
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Text Commands
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables text-command parsing in chat input in addition to native command surfaces where available. Keep this enabled for compatibility across channels that do not support native command registration.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Use Access Groups
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enforce access-group allowlists/policies for commands.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`
              `</section>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-session">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"></path>`
      `<circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"></circle>`
      `<path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"></path>`
      `<path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"></path>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session management and persistence`</p>`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Agent-to-Agent
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Groups controls for inter-agent session exchanges, including loop prevention limits on reply chaining. Keep defaults unless you run advanced agent-to-agent automation with strict turn caps.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Agent-to-Agent Ping-Pong Turns`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Max reply-back turns between requester and target agents during agent-to-agent exchanges (0-5). Use lower values to hard-limit chatter loops and preserve predictable run completion.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`DM Session Scope`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`DM session scoping: "main" keeps continuity, while "per-peer", "per-channel-peer", and "per-account-channel-peer" increase isolation. Use isolated modes for shared inboxes or multi-account deployments.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`main
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`per-peer
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`per-channel-peer
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`per-account-channel-peer
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Identity Links
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maps canonical identities to provider-prefixed peer IDs so equivalent users resolve to one DM thread (example: telegram:123456). Use this when the same human appears across multiple channels or accounts.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-map">`
      `<div class="cfg-map__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-map__label">`Custom entries
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-map__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-map__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add Entry
        `</button>`
      `</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-map__empty">`No custom entries.`</div>`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Idle Minutes`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Applies a legacy idle reset window in minutes for session reuse behavior across inactivity gaps. Use this only for compatibility and prefer structured reset policies under session.reset/session.resetByType.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Main Key`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Overrides the canonical main session key used for continuity when dmScope or routing logic points to "main". Use a stable value only if you intentionally need custom session anchoring.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Maintenance
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Automatic session-store maintenance controls for pruning age, entry caps, and file rotation behavior. Start in warn mode to observe impact, then enforce once thresholds are tuned.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Disk High-water Target`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Target size after disk-budget cleanup (high-water mark). Defaults to 80% of maxDiskBytes; set explicitly for tighter reclaim behavior on constrained disks.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Max Disk Budget`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional per-agent sessions-directory disk budget (for example `500mb`). Use this to cap session storage per agent; when exceeded, warn mode reports pressure and enforce mode performs oldest-first cleanup.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Max Entries`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Caps total session entry count retained in the store to prevent unbounded growth over time. Use lower limits for constrained environments, or higher limits when longer history is required.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Maintenance Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Determines whether maintenance policies are only reported ("warn") or actively applied ("enforce"). Keep "warn" during rollout and switch to "enforce" after validating safe thresholds.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`enforce
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`warn
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Prune After`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Removes entries older than this duration (for example `30d` or `12h`) during maintenance passes. Use this as the primary age-retention control and align it with data retention policy.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Prune Days (Deprecated)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Deprecated age-retention field kept for compatibility with legacy configs using day counts. Use session.maintenance.pruneAfter instead so duration syntax and behavior are consistent.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!----><div class="cfg-field cfg-field--error">

    `<div class="cfg-field__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Reset Archive Retention`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-field__error">`Unsupported schema node. Use Raw mode.`</div>`
    `</div><!---->``<!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Rotate Size`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Rotates the session store when file size exceeds a threshold such as `10mb` or `1gb`. Use this to bound single-file growth and keep backup/restore operations manageable.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Parent Fork Max Tokens`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum parent-session token count allowed for thread/session inheritance forking. If the parent exceeds this, OpenClaw starts a fresh thread session instead of forking; set 0 to disable this protection.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Reset Policy
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Defines the default reset policy object used when no type-specific or channel-specific override applies. Set this first, then layer resetByType or resetByChannel only where behavior must differ.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Daily Reset Hour`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets local-hour boundary (0-23) for daily reset mode so sessions roll over at predictable times. Use with mode=daily and align to operator timezone expectations for human-readable behavior.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets inactivity window before reset for idle mode and can also act as secondary guard with daily mode. Use larger values to preserve continuity or smaller values for fresher short-lived threads.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`

        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`

      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Reset Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Selects reset strategy: "daily" resets at a configured hour and "idle" resets after inactivity windows. Keep one clear mode per policy to avoid surprising context turnover patterns.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`

            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`idle

            `<!---->`

        `</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</details>`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Lists message triggers that force a session reset when matched in inbound content. Use sparingly for explicit reset phrases so context is not dropped unexpectedly during normal conversation.`</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Scope`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets base session grouping strategy: "per-sender" isolates by sender and "global" shares one session per channel context. Keep "per-sender" for safer multi-user behavior unless deliberate shared context is required.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`per-sender
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`global
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Send Policy
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls cross-session send permissions using allow/deny rules evaluated against channel, chatType, and key prefixes. Use this to fence where session tools can deliver messages in complex environments.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Send Policy Default Action`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets fallback action when no sendPolicy rule matches: "allow" or "deny". Keep "allow" for simpler setups, or choose "deny" when you require explicit allow rules for every destination.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`allow
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`deny
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Send Policy Rules
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Ordered allow/deny rules evaluated before the default action, for example `{ action: "deny", match: { channel: "discord" } }`. Put most specific rules first so broad rules do not shadow exceptions.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Store Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sets the session storage file path used to persist session records across restarts. Use an explicit path only when you need custom disk layout, backup routing, or mounted-volume storage.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Thread Bindings
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Shared defaults for thread-bound session routing behavior across providers that support thread focus workflows. Configure global defaults here and override per channel only when behavior differs.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Thread Binding Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Global master switch for thread-bound session routing features and focused thread delivery behavior. Keep enabled for modern thread workflows unless you need to disable thread binding globally.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Thread Binding Idle Timeout (hours)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Default inactivity window in hours for thread-bound sessions across providers/channels (0 disables idle auto-unfocus). Default: 24.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Thread Binding Max Age (hours)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional hard max age in hours for thread-bound sessions across providers/channels (0 disables hard cap). Default: 0.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Typing Interval (seconds)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls interval for repeated typing indicators while replies are being prepared in typing-capable channels. Increase to reduce chatty updates or decrease for more active typing feedback.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Session Typing Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls typing behavior timing: "never", "instant", "thinking", or "message" based emission points. Keep conservative modes in high-volume channels to avoid unnecessary typing noise.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`

            `<!----><!---->`

              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`

            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`message
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cron Max Concurrent Runs`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Limits how many cron jobs can execute at the same time when multiple schedules fire together. Use lower values to protect CPU/memory under heavy automation load, or raise carefully for higher throughput.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cron Retry Policy
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`reliability`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Overrides the default retry policy for one-shot jobs when they fail with transient errors (rate limit, network, server_error). Omit to use defaults: maxAttempts 3, backoffMs [30000, 60000, 300000], retry all transient types.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cron Retry Backoff (ms)
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`reliability`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Backoff delays in ms for each retry attempt (default: [30000, 60000, 300000]). Use shorter values for faster retries.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cron Retry Max Attempts`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Max retries for one-shot jobs on transient errors before permanent disable (default: 3).`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`reliability`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`

    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Pruning controls for per-job cron run history files under `cron/runs/&lt;jobId&gt;.jsonl`, including size and line retention.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cron Run Log Keep Lines`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`How many trailing run-log lines to retain when a file exceeds maxBytes (default `2000`). Increase for longer forensic history or lower for smaller disks.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cron Run Log Max Bytes`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum bytes per cron run-log file before pruning rewrites to the last keepLines entries (for example `2mb`, default `2000000`).`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cron Session Retention`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls how long completed cron run sessions are kept before pruning (`24h`, `7d`, `1h30m`, or `false` to disable pruning; default: `24h`). Use shorter retention to reduce storage growth on high-frequency schedules.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cron Store Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Path to the cron job store file used to persist scheduled jobs across restarts. Set an explicit path only when you need custom storage layout, backups, or mounted volumes.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cron Legacy Webhook (Deprecated)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Deprecated legacy fallback webhook URL used only for old jobs with `notify=true`. Migrate to per-job delivery using `delivery.mode="webhook"` plus `delivery.to`, and avoid relying on this global field.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Cron Webhook Bearer Token`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Bearer token attached to cron webhook POST deliveries when webhook mode is used. Prefer secret/env substitution and rotate this token regularly if shared webhook endpoints are internet-reachable.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`automation`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="password" placeholder="••••">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`
              `</section>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-hooks">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path>`
      `<path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Hooks`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Webhooks and event hooks`</p>`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Hooks Allowed Agent IDs
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allowlist of agent IDs that hook mappings are allowed to target when selecting execution agents. Use this to constrain automation events to dedicated service agents.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-array">`
      `<div class="cfg-array__header">`
        `<div class="cfg-array__title">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-array__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Hooks Allowed Session Key Prefixes
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<span class="cfg-array__count"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`0 item`<!--?lit$793307428$-->`s
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-array__add">`
          `<span class="cfg-array__add-icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>`
      `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
      `</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allowlist of accepted session-key prefixes for inbound hook requests when caller-provided keys are enabled. Use narrow prefixes to prevent arbitrary session-key injection.`</div>`

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
              `<div class="cfg-array__empty">`No items yet. Click "Add" to create one.`</div>`

    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Hooks Allow Request Session Key
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allows callers to supply a session key in hook requests when true, enabling caller-controlled routing. Keep false unless trusted integrators explicitly need custom session threading.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Hooks Default Session Key`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Fallback session key used for hook deliveries when a request does not provide one through allowed channels. Use a stable but scoped key to avoid mixing unrelated automation conversations.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Hooks Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables the hooks endpoint and mapping execution pipeline for inbound webhook requests. Keep disabled unless you are actively routing external events into the gateway.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail push integration settings used for Pub/Sub notifications and optional local callback serving. Keep this scoped to dedicated Gmail automation accounts where possible.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Account`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Google account identifier used for Gmail watch/subscription operations in this hook integration. Use a dedicated automation mailbox account to isolate operational permissions.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Allow Unsafe External Content
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allows less-sanitized external Gmail content to pass into processing when enabled. Keep disabled for safer defaults, and enable only for trusted mail streams with controlled transforms.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`access`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Callback URL`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Public callback URL Gmail or intermediaries invoke to deliver notifications into this hook pipeline. Keep this URL protected with token validation and restricted network exposure.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Include Body
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`When true, fetch and include email body content for downstream mapping/agent processing. Keep false unless body text is required, because this increases payload size and sensitivity.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Label`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional Gmail label filter limiting which labeled messages trigger hook events. Keep filters narrow to avoid flooding automations with unrelated inbox traffic.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Max Body Bytes`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum Gmail payload bytes processed per event when includeBody is enabled. Keep conservative limits to reduce oversized message processing cost and risk.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Model Override`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional model override for Gmail-triggered runs when mailbox automations should use dedicated model behavior. Keep unset to inherit agent defaults unless mailbox tasks need specialization.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Push Token`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Shared secret token required on Gmail push hook callbacks before processing notifications. Use env substitution and rotate if callback endpoints are exposed externally.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`security`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`auth`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="password" placeholder="••••">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Renew Interval (min)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Renewal cadence in minutes for Gmail watch subscriptions to prevent expiration. Set below provider expiration windows and monitor renew failures in logs.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Local Server
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Local callback server settings block for directly receiving Gmail notifications without a separate ingress layer. Enable only when this process should terminate webhook traffic itself.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Server Bind Address`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Bind address for the local Gmail callback HTTP server used when serving hooks directly. Keep loopback-only unless external ingress is intentionally required.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Server Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`HTTP path on the local Gmail callback server where push notifications are accepted. Keep this consistent with subscription configuration to avoid dropped events.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Server Port`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Port for the local Gmail callback HTTP server when serve mode is enabled. Use a dedicated port to avoid collisions with gateway/control interfaces.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`
        `<input type="number" class="cfg-number__input">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Subscription`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Pub/Sub subscription consumed by the gateway to receive Gmail change notifications from the configured topic. Keep subscription ownership clear so multiple consumers do not race unexpectedly.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Tailscale
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Tailscale exposure configuration block for publishing Gmail callbacks through Serve/Funnel routes. Use private tailnet modes before enabling any public ingress path.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Tailscale Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Tailscale exposure mode for Gmail callbacks: "off", "serve", or "funnel". Use "serve" for private tailnet delivery and "funnel" only when public internet ingress is required.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`off
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`serve
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`funnel
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Tailscale Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Path published by Tailscale Serve/Funnel for Gmail callback forwarding when enabled. Keep it aligned with Gmail webhook config so requests reach the expected handler.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Tailscale Target`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Local service target forwarded by Tailscale Serve/Funnel (for example http://127.0.0.1:8787). Use explicit loopback targets to avoid ambiguous routing.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Thinking Override`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Thinking effort override for Gmail-driven agent runs: "off", "minimal", "low", "medium", or "high". Keep modest defaults for routine inbox automations to control cost and latency.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`off
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`minimal
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`low
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`medium
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`high
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Gmail Hook Pub/Sub Topic`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Google Pub/Sub topic name used by Gmail watch to publish change notifications for this account. Ensure the topic IAM grants Gmail publish access before enabling watches.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Internal Hooks
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Internal hook runtime settings for bundled/custom event handlers loaded from module paths. Use this for trusted in-process automations and keep handler loading tightly scoped.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables processing for internal hook handlers and configured entries in the internal hook runtime. Keep disabled unless internal hook handlers are intentionally configured.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`

    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Maximum accepted webhook payload size in bytes before the request is rejected. Keep this bounded to reduce abuse risk and protect memory usage under bursty integrations.`</div>`

                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Browser Attach-only Mode
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Restricts browser mode to attach-only behavior without starting local browser processes. Use this when all browser sessions are externally managed by a remote CDP provider.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Browser CDP Port Range Start`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Starting local CDP port used for auto-allocated browser profile ports. Increase this when host-level port defaults conflict with other local services.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`

        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Browser CDP URL`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote CDP websocket URL used to attach to an externally managed browser instance. Use this for centralized browser hosts and keep URL access restricted to trusted network paths.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Browser Accent Color`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Default accent color used for browser profile/UI cues where colored identity hints are displayed. Use consistent colors to help operators identify active browser profile context quickly.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Browser Default Profile`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Default browser profile name selected when callers do not explicitly choose a profile. Use a stable low-privilege profile as the default to reduce accidental cross-context state use.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables browser capability wiring in the gateway so browser tools and CDP-driven workflows can run. Disable when browser automation is not needed to reduce surface area and startup work.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`

          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!----><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Browser Evaluate Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables browser-side evaluate helpers for runtime script evaluation capabilities where supported. Keep disabled unless your workflows require evaluate semantics beyond snapshots/navigation.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`

    `<!----><!---->`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Explicit browser executable path when auto-discovery is insufficient for your host environment. Use absolute stable paths so launch behavior stays deterministic across restarts.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Forces browser launch in headless mode when the local launcher starts browser instances. Keep headless enabled for server environments and disable only when visible UI debugging is required.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Disables Chromium sandbox isolation flags for environments where sandboxing fails at runtime. Keep this off whenever possible because process isolation protections are reduced.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

      `</summary>`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote CDP Handshake Timeout (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Timeout in milliseconds for post-connect CDP handshake readiness checks against remote browser targets. Raise this for slow-start remote browsers and lower to fail fast in automation loops.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`

        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Remote CDP Timeout (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Timeout in milliseconds for connecting to a remote CDP endpoint before failing the browser attach attempt. Increase for high-latency tunnels, or lower for faster failure detection.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!---->`

    `<div class="cfg-number">`

        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`+`</button>`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

      `</summary>`

      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Default snapshot extraction mode controlling how page content is transformed for agent consumption. Choose the mode that balances readability, fidelity, and token footprint for your workflows.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`advanced`<!---->`

    `</div>`

    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Server-side request forgery guardrail settings for browser/network fetch paths that could reach internal hosts. Keep restrictive defaults in production and open only explicitly approved targets.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</svg>`

          Add
        `</button>`
