      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-array__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Explicit hostname allowlist exceptions for SSRF policy checks on browser/network requests. Keep this list minimal and review entries regularly to avoid stale broad access.`</div>`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Legacy alias for browser.ssrfPolicy.dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwork. Prefer the dangerously-named key so risk intent is explicit.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Allows access to private-network address ranges from browser tooling. Default is enabled for trusted-network operator setups; disable to enforce strict public-only resolution checks.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Talk`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Voice and speech settings`</p>`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Use this legacy ElevenLabs API key for Talk mode only during migration, and keep secrets in env-backed storage. Prefer talk.providers.elevenlabs.apiKey (fallback: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY).`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="password" placeholder="••••">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`If true (default), stop assistant speech when the user starts speaking in Talk mode. Keep enabled for conversational turn-taking.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Legacy ElevenLabs model ID for Talk mode (default: eleven_v3). Prefer talk.providers.elevenlabs.modelId.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`models`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`media`<!---->`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enable automatic Discord bot presence updates based on runtime/model availability signals. When enabled: healthy=&gt;online, degraded/unknown=&gt;idle, exhausted/unavailable=&gt;dnd.

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional hard max age in hours for Telegram bound sessions. Set 0 to disable hard cap (default: 0). Overrides session.threadBindings.maxAgeHours when set.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`performance`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`channels`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Local bind port for the webhook listener. Defaults to 8787; set to 0 to let the OS assign an ephemeral port.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-number">`
        `<button type="button" class="cfg-number__btn">`−`</button>`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Secret token sent to Telegram during webhook registration and verified on inbound webhook requests. Telegram returns this value for verification; this is not the gateway auth token and not the bot token.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

    `</div>`

        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enable filesystem watching for skill-definition changes so updates can be applied without full process restart. Keep enabled in development workflows and disable in immutable production images.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`

      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Skills Watch Debounce (ms)`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Debounce window in milliseconds for coalescing rapid skill file changes before reload logic runs. Increase to reduce reload churn on frequent writes, or lower for faster edit feedback.`</div>`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Controls whether this plugin may mutate prompts through typed hooks.         `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`

          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`mDNS discovery configuration group for local network advertisement and discovery behavior tuning. Keep minimal mode for routine LAN discovery unless extra metadata is required.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
        `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`mDNS Discovery Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`mDNS broadcast mode ("minimal" default, "full" includes cliPath/sshPort, "off" disables mDNS).`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`off
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`minimal
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`full
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!----><!---->

    `<details class="cfg-object" open="">`
      `<summary class="cfg-object__header">`
        `<span class="cfg-object__title-wrap">`
          `<span class="cfg-object__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Wide-area Discovery
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<span class="cfg-object__chevron"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">`
      `<polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

      `</summary>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-object__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Wide-area discovery configuration group for exposing discovery signals beyond local-link scopes. Enable only in deployments that intentionally aggregate gateway presence across sites.`</div>`
      `<div class="cfg-object__content">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
      `<label class="cfg-toggle-row ">`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle-row__content">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle-row__label"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Wide-area Discovery Enabled
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><span class="cfg-toggle-row__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Enables wide-area discovery signaling when your environment needs non-local gateway discovery. Keep disabled unless cross-network discovery is operationally required.
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`network`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `</div>`
        `<div class="cfg-toggle">`
          `<input type="checkbox">`
          `<span class="cfg-toggle__track">`
        `</div>`
      `</label>`
    `<!---->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`
    `</details>`

<!---->

    `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`

    `</div>`

    `</div>`
              `</section>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<section class="config-section-card" id="config-section-logging">`
                `<div class="config-section-card__header">`
                  `<span class="config-section-card__icon"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">`
      `<path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"></path>`
      `<polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"></polyline>`
      `<line x1="16" y1="13" x2="8" y2="13"></line>`
      `<line x1="16" y1="17" x2="8" y2="17"></line>`
      `<polyline points="10 9 9 9 8 9"></polyline>`
    `</svg>`

                  `<div class="config-section-card__titles">`
                    `<h3 class="config-section-card__title"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`Logging`</h3>`
                    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><p class="config-section-card__desc">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Log levels and output configuration`</p>`
                  `</div>`
                `</div>`
                `<div class="config-section-card__content">`
                  `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `<div class="cfg-fields">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Console Log Level`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Console-specific log threshold: "silent", "fatal", "error", "warn", "info", "debug", or "trace" for terminal output control. Use this to keep local console quieter while retaining richer file logging if needed.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<select class="cfg-select">`
        `<option value="__unset__">`Select...`</option>`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
          `<option value="0"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`silent`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="1"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`fatal`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="2"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`error`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="3"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`warn`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="4"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`info`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="5"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`debug`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="6"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`trace`</option>`
        `<!---->`
      `</select>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Console Log Style`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Console output format style: "pretty", "compact", or "json" based on operator and ingestion needs. Use json for machine parsing pipelines and pretty/compact for human-first terminal workflows.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-segmented">`
            `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`pretty
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`compact
              `</button>`
            `<!----><!---->`
              `<button type="button" class="cfg-segmented__btn ">`
                `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`json
              `</button>`
            `<!---->`
          `</div>`
        `</div>`
      `<!----><!---->`
    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Log File Path`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Optional file path for persisted log output in addition to or instead of console logging. Use a managed writable path and align retention/rotation with your operational policy.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`storage`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<div class="cfg-input-wrap">`
        `<input class="cfg-input" type="text" placeholder="">`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
      `</div>`
    `</div>`

<!----><!---->

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Log Level`</label>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Primary log level threshold for runtime logger output: "silent", "fatal", "error", "warn", "info", "debug", or "trace". Keep "info" or "warn" for production, and use debug/trace only during investigation.`</div>`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`

    `<select class="cfg-select">`
        `<option value="__unset__">`Select...`</option>`
        `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->`

        `<!----><!---->`

          `<option value="3"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`warn`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="4"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`info`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`
          `<option value="5"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`debug`</option>`
        `<!----><!---->`

    `<div class="cfg-field">`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><label class="cfg-field__label">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sensitive Data Redaction Mode`</label>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$--><div class="cfg-field__help">``<!--?lit$793307428$-->`Sensitive redaction mode: "off" disables built-in masking, while "tools" redacts sensitive tool/config payload fields. Keep "tools" in shared logs unless you have isolated secure log sinks.`</div>`
          `<!--?lit$793307428$-->`
    `<div class="cfg-tags">`
      `<!--?lit$793307428$--><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`privacy`<!----><!---->``<span class="cfg-tag"><!--?lit$793307428$-->`observability`<!---->`
    `</div>`
